textByHash.0ca8306425618715214d743a44e235e79ac6117d: Hmm if it's really big, then my skills are limited to feet, legs and robes on big statues.
textByHash.2203bbc6d647c11939773dc9e5552e9a471fcadd: I am an architect. I designed and built many of the buildings in Arceuus using magic.
textByHash.45780de21553bcaa6d746562d6e393a5195f3b26: I am preparing. I will be there shortly.
textByHash.4ecd3fe9a4d8df29d24bf8d51bf543963f3a0f27: Why yes I am. How can I help you?
textByHash.5680cc66a83725b8e6cb435fb2b4bf3b0a2beda0: Possibly. What might this statue be?
textByHash.7d359740b901ab08097d90b2072deed7000cefee: Of course I will help you. You are referring of course to the statue that was destroyed in the storm. How large were you thinking?
textByHash.c9f27acd329f0e9982b5bb90216d5854dac34ac5: Truly a testament to a great King. Thank you for the opportunity to contribute.
textByHash.ef69ff25c413708b86927f103eb8ee3b2841b7f8: It is an honour to serve my city in such a way. Now, I am very busy, please leave.
